title: Red Moon Sword
description: My first-ever mod took a while to create!
body:
![The Recipe to BloodMoonSword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c649c853848d2b9ced91efb10085570877ea77f2.png)

Blood Moon Sword Recipe!

THIS MOD IS OFFICIAL HERE IS THE LINK TO THE CURSEFORGE ONE! [The Mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-moon-sword-mod)

This mod adds another layer of sword called Red Moon Sword it is the best sword in the game and it does 13 attack damage it is OP but very expensive. You should download it because it makes the game more fun.
